name: Creamy Pesto Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 package Mori-Nu silken soft tofu, drained (10.5 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1 In a blender or food processor, combine all ingredients.
2 Process on high for approximately 30 seconds.
3 Heat and serve over cooked pasta or steamed vegetables.
4 Makes 1 1/3 cups. Serving size: tbs
